## Summary

Describe the change and its user impact.

## Evidence and review

- [ ] I ran the relevant tests or validation command.
- [ ] I updated documentation and `NEWS.md` when appropriate.
- [ ] This change contains no Canada Post, PCCF, PCCF+, personal, or other
  restricted data.
- [ ] For a data change, I supplied reproducible provenance, licence,
  attribution, and a small redistributable fixture.
- [ ] For a data change, technical validation and provenance/licence reviews
  are recorded separately.
